formula interface

  • Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • View Source
Author

Haoyu Ji

Published

March 28, 2026

## corHMM version
## https://github.com/bbolker/corHMM/blob/bolker_clean/misc/test_RTMB.R
## remotes::install_github("bbolker/corHMM", ref = "bolker_clean")
source(here::here("R", "postAD.R"))
source(here::here("R", "general.R"))
source(here::here("R", "realtree.R"))
source(here::here("R", "benchmark.R"))
import data 
fish_traits <- read.csv(here::here('data', "binaryTraitData.csv"))
fish_tree   <- readRDS(here::here('data', "treeSingle.rds"))
data cleaning 
ctraits <- fish_traits[fish_traits$species %in% fish_tree$tip.label, ]

ctraits <- ctraits[match(fish_tree$tip.label, ctraits$species), ]

c_traits <- data.frame(
  Species = ctraits$species,
  ag = ctraits$ag,
  care = ctraits$care,
  spawning = ctraits$spawning
)

c_traits <- c_traits[!is.na(c_traits$care) & !is.na(c_traits$spawning), ]
c_tree <- drop.tip(fish_tree, setdiff(fish_tree$tip.label, c_traits$Species))
c_tree <- reorder(c_tree, "pruningwise")

c_traits <- c_traits[match(c_tree$tip.label, c_traits$Species), ]
resampling and running 
ntaxvec <- as.numeric(45:234)
dd <- expand.grid(seed = 101:104, ntaxa  = ntaxvec)

res <- list()
for (i in seq_len(nrow(dd))) {
  cat(sprintf("\rRunning %d/%d", i, nrow(dd)))
  flush.console()

  ntaxa_i <- dd$ntaxa[i]
  sub <- sample_subtree(tree = c_tree, traits = c_traits, ntaxa  = ntaxa_i)
  args_i <- c(
    as.list(dd[i, ]),   
    list(
      traitMatrix = sub$traits, 
      realtree = sub$tree,
      formula_list = list(ag~care*spawning, care~1, spawning~1)
    )
  )

  res[[i]] <- do.call(adsum, args_i)
}

res_df <- do.call(rbind, res)
saveRDS(res_df, file = here::here("data", "post3trait_sub.rds"))
importing rds 
dd <- readRDS(here::here("data", "post3trait_sub.rds"))
if (!is.data.frame(dd)) dd <- as.data.frame(t(dd))
dd$ldiff <- dd$rates_loglik - dd$formula_loglik
tt <- t.test(dd$ldiff)
qq <- quantile(dd$ldiff, c(0.25, 0.75))
loglik boxplot 
dd$ntaxa_bin <- cut(
  dd$ntaxa,
  breaks = c(0, 60, 100, 150, 250),
  labels = c("≤60", "61–100", "101–150", "151+")
)

ggplot(dd, aes(x = ntaxa_bin, y = ldiff)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "gray", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Number of taxa (binned)",
    y = "nll difference in log-likelihood\n(rates - formula)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
basic operations 
ddtb <- dd |>
  transmute(
    seed, ntaxa, ntrait,
    ldiff,
    opt_rates = rates_opt.time,
    opt_formula = formula_opt.time,
    tot_rates = rates_tot.time,
    tot_formula = formula_tot.time
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(opt_rates, opt_formula, tot_rates, tot_formula),
    names_to      = c("type", "method"),
    names_pattern = "(opt|tot)_(rates|formula)",
    values_to     = "value"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    type   = factor(type,   levels = c("opt", "tot")),
    method = factor(method, levels = c("formula", "rates")),

    good = case_when(
      is.na(ldiff) ~ NA_character_,
      abs(ldiff) < 1e-6 ~ "OK",  
      ldiff < 0 ~ "rates",  
      ldiff > 0 ~ "formula"
    ),
    good = factor(good, levels = c("OK", "formula", "rates"))
  )
visualize time output 
ggplot(ddtb, aes(x = ntaxa, y = value, colour = method)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  facet_wrap(~ type, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",  
    se = FALSE,
    size = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of taxa",
    y = "time (seconds)",
    colour   = "method"
  ) +
    scale_colour_discrete_qualitative() +
  theme_minimal()
reveal in proportion 
dd$speedup_tot  <- dd$rates_tot.time / dd$formula_tot.time
dd$speedup_opt  <- dd$rates_opt.time / dd$formula_opt.time

speed_sum <- dd |> 
  group_by(ntaxa) |>
  summarise(
    med_speedup_tot = median(speedup_tot, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_speedup_opt = median(speedup_opt, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("med_speedup_"),
    names_to = "type",
    values_to = "med_speedup"
  )

ggplot(speed_sum, aes(x = ntaxa, y = med_speedup)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1, colour = NULL), 
    method = "loess",
    se = FALSE,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ type, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Number of taxa",
    y = "Median speedup (orig / RTMB)",
    colour = "Model"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

Now we plot computation time and negative log likelihood results together. For the same seed and ntaxa, we compare the results from rates and formula, and select the result with the smaller NLL (“nll winner”). This result is then put on a scatter plot with ntaxa on the x-axis and comp-time on the y-axis. The size of the point represents the advantage of the nll winner over the other method in that case. Maybe we can conclude that formula has absolute advantage over rates?

nll winner 
ddtb_win <- bind_rows(
  ddtb |> filter(good %in% c("formula", "rates"), as.character(method) == as.character(good))
)
ggplot(
  ddtb_win,
  aes(x = ntaxa, y = value)
) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = good, size = abs(ldiff))) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c(
      "OK"   = adjustcolor("grey", alpha.f = 0.2),
      "formula" = "#377EB8",
      "rates" = "#E41A1C"
    ),
    na.value = "black"
  ) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.5, 3), guide = "none") +
  facet_wrap(~ type, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of taxa",
    y = "time of better nll (opt)",
    colour = "smaller nll"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```{r pkgs, include=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("here")
library(Matrix)
library(ape)
library(tidyverse); theme_set(theme_bw())
library(expm)
library(RTMB)
library(colorspace)
```

```{r seed, include=FALSE}
set.seed(427)
```

```{r funs}
#| code-fold: false
## corHMM version
## https://github.com/bbolker/corHMM/blob/bolker_clean/misc/test_RTMB.R
## remotes::install_github("bbolker/corHMM", ref = "bolker_clean")
source(here::here("R", "postAD.R"))
source(here::here("R", "general.R"))
source(here::here("R", "realtree.R"))
source(here::here("R", "benchmark.R"))
```

```{r realdat}
#| code-summary: "import data"
fish_traits <- read.csv(here::here('data', "binaryTraitData.csv"))
fish_tree   <- readRDS(here::here('data', "treeSingle.rds"))
```

```{r clean3traits}
#| code-summary: "data cleaning"
ctraits <- fish_traits[fish_traits$species %in% fish_tree$tip.label, ]

ctraits <- ctraits[match(fish_tree$tip.label, ctraits$species), ]

c_traits <- data.frame(
  Species = ctraits$species,
  ag = ctraits$ag,
  care = ctraits$care,
  spawning = ctraits$spawning
)

c_traits <- c_traits[!is.na(c_traits$care) & !is.na(c_traits$spawning), ]
c_tree <- drop.tip(fish_tree, setdiff(fish_tree$tip.label, c_traits$Species))
c_tree <- reorder(c_tree, "pruningwise")

c_traits <- c_traits[match(c_tree$tip.label, c_traits$Species), ]
```

```{r getdat, eval = FALSE}
#| code-summary: "resampling and running"
ntaxvec <- as.numeric(45:234)
dd <- expand.grid(seed = 101:104, ntaxa  = ntaxvec)

res <- list()
for (i in seq_len(nrow(dd))) {
  cat(sprintf("\rRunning %d/%d", i, nrow(dd)))
  flush.console()

  ntaxa_i <- dd$ntaxa[i]
  sub <- sample_subtree(tree = c_tree, traits = c_traits, ntaxa  = ntaxa_i)
  args_i <- c(
    as.list(dd[i, ]),   
    list(
      traitMatrix = sub$traits, 
      realtree = sub$tree,
      formula_list = list(ag~care*spawning, care~1, spawning~1)
    )
  )

  res[[i]] <- do.call(adsum, args_i)
}

res_df <- do.call(rbind, res)
saveRDS(res_df, file = here::here("data", "post3trait_sub.rds"))
```

```{r dat}
#| code-summary: "importing rds"
dd <- readRDS(here::here("data", "post3trait_sub.rds"))
if (!is.data.frame(dd)) dd <- as.data.frame(t(dd))
dd$ldiff <- dd$rates_loglik - dd$formula_loglik
tt <- t.test(dd$ldiff)
qq <- quantile(dd$ldiff, c(0.25, 0.75))
```

```{r loglik}
#| code-summary: "loglik boxplot"
dd$ntaxa_bin <- cut(
  dd$ntaxa,
  breaks = c(0, 60, 100, 150, 250),
  labels = c("≤60", "61–100", "101–150", "151+")
)

ggplot(dd, aes(x = ntaxa_bin, y = ldiff)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "gray", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    x = "Number of taxa (binned)",
    y = "nll difference in log-likelihood\n(rates - formula)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r ddtb}
#| code-summary: "basic operations"
ddtb <- dd |>
  transmute(
    seed, ntaxa, ntrait,
    ldiff,
    opt_rates = rates_opt.time,
    opt_formula = formula_opt.time,
    tot_rates = rates_tot.time,
    tot_formula = formula_tot.time
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(opt_rates, opt_formula, tot_rates, tot_formula),
    names_to      = c("type", "method"),
    names_pattern = "(opt|tot)_(rates|formula)",
    values_to     = "value"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    type   = factor(type,   levels = c("opt", "tot")),
    method = factor(method, levels = c("formula", "rates")),

    good = case_when(
      is.na(ldiff) ~ NA_character_,
      abs(ldiff) < 1e-6 ~ "OK",  
      ldiff < 0 ~ "rates",  
      ldiff > 0 ~ "formula"
    ),
    good = factor(good, levels = c("OK", "formula", "rates"))
  )
```

```{r together}
#| code-summary: "visualize time output"
ggplot(ddtb, aes(x = ntaxa, y = value, colour = method)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  facet_wrap(~ type, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",  
    se = FALSE,
    size = 0.8
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of taxa",
    y = "time (seconds)",
    colour   = "method"
  ) +
    scale_colour_discrete_qualitative() +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r prop}
#| code-summary: "reveal in proportion"
dd$speedup_tot  <- dd$rates_tot.time / dd$formula_tot.time
dd$speedup_opt  <- dd$rates_opt.time / dd$formula_opt.time

speed_sum <- dd |> 
  group_by(ntaxa) |>
  summarise(
    med_speedup_tot = median(speedup_tot, na.rm = TRUE),
    med_speedup_opt = median(speedup_opt, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("med_speedup_"),
    names_to = "type",
    values_to = "med_speedup"
  )

ggplot(speed_sum, aes(x = ntaxa, y = med_speedup)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(
    aes(group = 1, colour = NULL), 
    method = "loess",
    se = FALSE,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ type, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Number of taxa",
    y = "Median speedup (orig / RTMB)",
    colour = "Model"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

Now we plot computation time and negative log likelihood results together. For the same seed and ntaxa, we compare the results from rates and formula, and select the result with the smaller NLL ("nll winner"). This result is then put on a scatter plot with ntaxa on the x-axis and comp-time on the y-axis. The size of the point represents the advantage of the nll winner over the other method in that case. Maybe we can conclude that formula has absolute advantage over rates?

```{r nll-scatter}
#| code-summary: "nll winner"
ddtb_win <- bind_rows(
  ddtb |> filter(good %in% c("formula", "rates"), as.character(method) == as.character(good))
)
ggplot(
  ddtb_win,
  aes(x = ntaxa, y = value)
) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = good, size = abs(ldiff))) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c(
      "OK"   = adjustcolor("grey", alpha.f = 0.2),
      "formula" = "#377EB8",
      "rates" = "#E41A1C"
    ),
    na.value = "black"
  ) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.5, 3), guide = "none") +
  facet_wrap(~ type, nrow = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Number of taxa",
    y = "time of better nll (opt)",
    colour = "smaller nll"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
